Osvaldo reveals smoking room at Juventus, discusses depression battle and near-move to Napoli
arts.sum: In a candid interview with Tyc Sport in Argentina, former striker Pablo Daniel Osvaldo has made some surprising revelations about his time in Italian football, particularly at Juventus. The ex-Roma, Inter, and Fiorentina player also opened up about his recent struggle with depression and a potential move to Napoli that never materialized. Osvaldo, who spent six months at Juventus from January to June 2014, disclosed the existence of a designated smoking area for players: “When I was at Juventus, we had our own smoking room. arts.ttl: Osimhen bomb! 'First yes' for transfer deal
arts.sum: Napoli would be open to selling Victor Osimhen to Serie A rivals Juventus, but there is a problem, according to Italian media. As a result, the names of other clubs have been bandied about in the media, with Napoli's Serie A rivals Juventus the latest side to be linked with Osimhen.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Napoli v Como: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Serie A leaders Napoli prepare to host Como at the Stadio Maradona, both teams are expected to maintain their winning lineups from recent matches. Antonio Conte’s Napoli currently hold a slim one-point advantage over Juventus at the top of the table, having gone undefeated in their last five league encounters. Meanwhile, Cesc Fabregas’ Como side enters the match with momentum, having secured victories in their previous two Serie A outings, including an impressive 3-2 away victory over Atalanta in Bergamo. arts.ttl: Napoli vs. Como to kick off matchday 7
arts.sum: Como have scored 3+ goals in consecutive Serie A matches for just the second time in the top division, after last doing so in the 1951-52 season (v Udinese and Legnano in that case) – in general, the last newly promoted team in the top-flight to have scored at least three goals in three consecutive matches was Palermo between December 2014 and January 2015. Como are the team to have conceded the most goals from the 76th minute of play onwards in Serie A this term (5), while Napoli have scored four goals in the same time frame (a joint-high level with Parma) .

arts.ttl: Romelu Lukaku Credits Galatasaray Ace for Guiding His Move to Napoli
arts.sum: Former Inter and Roma striker Romelu Lukaku has returned to Serie A to reunite with his favorite head coach, Antonio Conte, at Napoli. The Belgium international has enjoyed a bright start to life at Stadio Diego Armando Maradona, tallying two goals and three assists in his first five appearances for the Partenopei.
